# Home {.unnumbered}

OPALX is an open-source, exascale-ready, performance-portable accelerator simulation framework.

The OPALX Physics Manual collects the underlying theory, numerical models, and
benchmark problems used throughout the code base.

Here you can find the [OPALX USer Manual](https://opalx-project.github.io/Manual/).

The source code is locate in [OPALX's Git Repository](https://github.com/OPALX-project/OPALX).
